objective: Maximize persistence skill of a 72h z500/t850 WeatherBench-2 forecast model built under a fixed compute budget
metric: persistence skill score (1 - mean(rmse/persistence); >0 beats persistence)

criteria.outcome: A complete model.py exists defining train_and_predict(Xtr,Ytr,Xte,meta,time_budget_s,device) that runs end-to-end and returns finite predictions of the correct shape.
criteria.observe: Read model.py; run/submit it and confirm no errors and predictions pass the finite check.

criteria.outcome: The model achieves a positive persistence skill score (>0, i.e. it beats the 72h persistence baseline) on submission.
criteria.observe: Submit the model and read the reported skill score; confirm it is > 0.

criteria.outcome: At least one submit-improve iteration was performed and the best model's skill was reported clearly, keeping the highest-scoring version.
criteria.observe: Check submission history shows >=2 submits with the best skill retained and stated explicitly.

criteria.outcome: Training respects the fixed compute budget without overrunning time_budget_s.
criteria.observe: Inspect model.py for time.time() deadline checks and confirm submission logs show no time-overrun penalty.
